$comment: implement: a validated spec -> a built app, hands-free. validate (spec oracle -> AST) -> scaffold (deterministic structure + a worklist of TODO files) -> fill (foreach: run edit_file per file to fill the bodies) -> build. Input = the spec text; run in the target workspace via --ws.
summary: Build an app from a validated spec: scaffold the structure deterministically, fill each body with the model (foreach edit_file), then compile the whole project.
